sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71657" key="cifistu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξῐφ-ιστύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ύος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71657.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μαχαιρομαχία</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sword-play,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
